name: Summa Silver Corp.
summary: Summa Silver Corp. engages in the gold and silver exploration business. The company holds a 100% interest in the Hughes Property consisting of 57 patented mining claims and 103 un-patented mining claims with an area of 2,547 acres located in central Nevada. It also has an option to earn a 100% interest in the Mogollon Property located in New Mexico. The company was formerly known as Pinnacle North Gold Corp. and changed its name to Summa Silver Corp. in April 2020. Summa Silver Corp. was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
